surveyframe TODO

Source: todo.md

This checklist reflects the current CRAN-hardening and release plan. Checkpoint as of 2026-04-21: dependency reduction is complete, optional-package guards are in place, documentation was regenerated, and the standard clean source build plus R CMD check are passing.

Phase 0: CRAN hardening

Phase 1: submission pack

Phase 2: documentation and adoption

Phase 3: workflow completion

Phase 4: companion packages

On this page

Developed by Mohammed Ali Sharafuddin. Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.

surveyframe is an open-source R package for survey research. MIT License.
